name: JSF++: Certified Libraries Only
description: Only DO-178B Level A certifiable (SEAL 1) C/C++ libraries are used with safety-critical code.
rationale: JSF++ AV Rule 16: only DO-178B Level A certifiable or SEAL 1 C/C++ libraries shall be used with safety-critical (SEAL 1) code.
source: JSF Air Vehicle C++ Coding Standards (Lockheed Martin, Doc. 2RDU00001 Rev C, Dec 2005). https://www.stroustrup.com/JSF-AV-rules.pdf
